Metadata.title: NEURON — Decision Intelligence for Product Teams
Metadata.description: NEURON is an AI-powered Decision System of Record that ingests signals from Slack, Jira, Notion, user interviews, and more — then uses multi-agent AI to synthesize insights and produce decision-ready artifacts.
Metadata.ogDescription: Stop burying decisions in noise. NEURON synthesizes product signals into decision-ready artifacts with multi-agent AI.
Metadata.productDescription: Explore NEURON's AI-powered features: signal ingestion, multi-agent synthesis, decision artifacts, and full traceability.
Metadata.whyNeuronDescription: Learn why product teams choose NEURON to solve the decision synthesis bottleneck and ship with clarity.
Metadata.integrationsDescription: NEURON integrates with Slack, Jira, Notion, Linear, GitHub, and more. It doesn't replace your tools — it connects them.
Metadata.pricingDescription: Simple, transparent pricing for teams of every size. Start free, upgrade as you grow.
Metadata.blogDescription: Insights on decision intelligence, product management, and multi-agent AI from the NEURON team.
Metadata.getDemoDescription: See how NEURON transforms product signals into decision-ready artifacts. Request a personalized demo for your team.

Hero.h2: NEURON is an AI-powered Decision System of Record that ingests signals from Slack, Jira, Notion, user interviews, and more — then uses multi-agent AI to synthesize insights and produce decision-ready artifacts like PRDs, tickets, and strategy briefs.
Hero.trustLine: Trusted by product teams at fast-moving B2B SaaS companies

TrustBar.heading: Connects to the tools you already use

Problem.heading: Modern teams don't fail from lack of data.
Problem.subheading: They fail because decisions get buried in noise.
Problem.pain1Description: PMs spend 30–50% of their time summarizing and re-aligning stakeholders instead of making decisions.
Problem.pain2Description: Decisions are re-litigated because context is lost in Slack threads and doc comments that no one can find.
Problem.pain3Description: Executives can't see WHY decisions were made — only the output. Strategy reviews become guesswork.

Features.heading: Your <highlight>unfair advantage</highlight> in product decisions
Features.tab1Description: NEURON connects to your existing tools and automatically captures product signals — Slack feedback, user interviews, support tickets, analytics events, competitor mentions, and more.
Features.tab2Title: AI agents that challenge each other.
Features.tab2Description: Unlike single-model tools, NEURON uses adversarial multi-agent AI. Agents argue, validate, and stress-test insights — so you get recommendations that have survived scrutiny, not just pattern matching.
Features.tab3Description: NEURON doesn't just analyze — it produces. Get draft PRDs, prioritized tickets, decision briefs, and strategy memos that you can review, refine, and export directly to Jira, Linear, or Notion.
Features.tab4Description: Every decision is linked back to the signals, discussions, and agent reasoning that produced it. Six months from now, anyone can trace WHY a decision was made — not just that it was.

HowItWorks.heading: How it works
HowItWorks.subheading: From signal to ship in three simple steps.
HowItWorks.step1Description: Link your Slack, Jira, Notion workspace in minutes. NEURON starts ingesting signals immediately.
HowItWorks.step2Description: Multi-agent AI analyzes signals and drafts decision artifacts — with adversarial validation built in.
HowItWorks.step3Description: Export PRDs and tickets back to Jira/Linear/Notion with full traceability. Ship with confidence.

StakeholderValue.heading: Built for every decision-maker on your team
StakeholderValue.description1: See the full evidence trail behind every product decision. Run strategy reviews backed by data, not opinions. Ensure consistency across squads.
StakeholderValue.description2: Stop relying on summaries of summaries. Get direct visibility into why teams are building what they're building — with the receipts to back it up.
StakeholderValue.description3: Stop writing PRDs from scratch. Stop re-explaining decisions. NEURON drafts artifacts and maintains context so you can focus on what matters — shipping.

Testimonials.heading: What product teams say
Testimonials.quote1: NEURON gave us a source of truth for why we built what we built. Our board reviews have never been cleaner.
Testimonials.quote2: We cut our decision-to-ship cycle by 40%. The multi-agent synthesis catches blind spots our team routinely missed.
Testimonials.quote3: Onboarding new PMs used to take weeks of context transfer. Now they search NEURON and have full decision history in minutes.

FinalCTA.heading: Stop losing decisions to noise.
FinalCTA.subheading: Join product teams that ship with clarity.

ProductPage.heroDescription: NEURON is the first Decision System of Record — an AI-powered platform that ingests product signals, synthesizes them through multi-agent AI, and produces decision-ready artifacts with full traceability.

WhyNeuronPage.heroTitle: The bottleneck isn't engineering velocity. It's <highlight>decision synthesis</highlight>.
WhyNeuronPage.heroDescription: Product teams drown in signals from Slack, Jira, user interviews, and analytics. NEURON transforms that noise into clear, traceable decisions — so you ship the right thing, not just the next thing.

IntegrationsPage.heroDescription: Connect your existing tools in minutes. NEURON ingests signals from every source and publishes decisions back — no workflow disruption, no migration required.

IntegrationDetails.heading: All integrations
IntegrationDetails.slackDescription: Captures feedback, discussions, and decisions from channels and threads in real-time.
IntegrationDetails.jiraDescription: Syncs tickets, comments, sprint data, and status changes for full development context.
IntegrationDetails.notionDescription: Ingests documents, databases, meeting notes, and product specs from your workspace.
IntegrationDetails.linearDescription: Pulls issues, project updates, and cycle data for engineering-aligned decision making.
IntegrationDetails.githubDescription: Monitors pull requests, issues, code reviews, and release notes for technical signals.
IntegrationDetails.confluenceDescription: Reads documentation, decision records, and team knowledge bases for organizational context.
IntegrationDetails.googleDescription: Connects to Docs, Sheets, and Slides for strategy documents and shared analysis.
IntegrationDetails.hubspotDescription: Ingests customer feedback, deal signals, and support tickets for voice-of-customer insights.
IntegrationDetails.discordDescription: Captures community feedback, feature requests, and user discussions from your server.
IntegrationDetails.figmaDescription: Tracks design comments, version history, and collaboration signals from your design files.

PricingPage.heroDescription: Start free, scale as your team grows. Every plan includes multi-agent AI synthesis and full decision traceability.

Pricing.freeDescription: For individuals and small teams getting started with decision intelligence.
Pricing.proDescription: For product teams that need full-powered decision intelligence across all their tools.
Pricing.enterpriseDescription: For organizations that need enterprise-grade security, compliance, and dedicated support.

BlogPage.heroDescription: Perspectives on product management, multi-agent AI, and the future of how teams make decisions.

Blog.article1Title: How Multi-Agent AI Transforms Product Decisions
Blog.article1Excerpt: Single-model AI gives you answers. Multi-agent AI gives you answers that have survived scrutiny. Here's why adversarial validation changes everything.
Blog.article2Title: The Cost of Decision Debt in Product Teams
Blog.article2Excerpt: Every decision that isn't documented, traced, or validated creates compounding debt. We calculated what that costs the average product team.
Blog.article3Title: From Signals to Ship: A NEURON Workflow Guide
Blog.article3Excerpt: A step-by-step guide to setting up NEURON, connecting your tools, and producing your first decision artifact in under 30 minutes.
Blog.article4Title: Why Traceability Matters More Than You Think
Blog.article4Excerpt: When someone asks 'why did we build this?' six months from now, you'll want a better answer than 'I think it was in a Slack thread somewhere.'

GetDemo.heading: See NEURON <highlight>in action</highlight>
GetDemo.subheading: Get a personalized demo tailored to your team's workflow. See how NEURON turns scattered signals into clear, traceable decisions.
GetDemo.value1Description: See NEURON configured for your team's tools and workflow — not a generic product tour.
GetDemo.value2Description: Learn about SSO, data residency, and compliance features built for regulated industries.
GetDemo.value3Description: Teams see measurable decision velocity improvements within the first two sprints.
GetDemo.testimonialQuote: The demo showed us exactly how NEURON would fit into our existing Slack-Jira-Notion workflow. We were onboarded within a week.
GetDemo.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.
GetDemo.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your team's decision-making challenges...
GetDemo.disclaimer: By submitting, you agree to receive communications from NEURON. We respect your privacy.
GetDemo.successMessage: We've received your request. A member of our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule your personalized demo.
GetDemo.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
GetDemo.errorMissingKey: Form configuration error. Please contact support.
